text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the last day of summer camp, and Biwa
Hayahide has improved so much that she's almost
a different racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought she might've gained more confidence as
well, but...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: So, Ticket is her biggest threat?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
At this point, I'm not sure if I'll ever catch up to
those two...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can barely hear what she murmurs as she stares
at a huge thundercloud. She's clearly still anxious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling that I need to come up with a
new way to encourage her and break her out of
this funk.
